title: Create PHPUnit tests for all Phase 2 components
acceptance_criteria: BrailleMatrix tests verify correct hex bytes for dot patterns
BrailleCanvas tests verify setPoint, setLine, clear, render
RingBuffer tests verify O(1) push and chronological toArray
Plot tests verify LineChart, ScatterPlot, MarkerBraille/MarkerDot
Sparkline tests verify 8-block scaling and dim edge
GaugeWithDetail tests verify label, bar, detail overlay, percentage
